estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: HATU 38% price spike: base HATU cost contribution ~$1,088/kg API × 38% = $413/kg API. Source: MRP signal_priority_weights rank 6, tariff_impact_at_55pct $598.40 → back-calculated base contribution. High sensitivity parameter (rank 6).
estimated_timeline_reasoning: HATU lead time extended from 3 to 11 weeks per supplier notice. Chemsy 500 kg/quarter cap constrains batch scheduling. At current demand, cap creates a 6–8 week scheduling queue.
caveats: EU alternative suppliers (Fluorochem, Sigma-Aldrich) identified but not yet on approved vendor list.
500 kg/quarter cap from Chemsy may force batch size reduction or schedule delays.
